writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe your past habits
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing habits you had in the past but no longer have, using used to/didn't use to.
writing.sampleAnswer: I used to play football every weekend when I was young. I used to live in the countryside. We didn't use to have a car back then. We no longer live like that nowadays.
checklist: Dùng used to ít nhất 2 lần
Dùng didn't use to ít nhất 1 lần
Có từ chỉ sự thay đổi (no longer, nowadays)

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Report what people said
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) reporting what different people said, using Reported Speech (said that).
writing.sampleAnswer: Mai said that she was tired yesterday. He told me that he worked at a big company. The manager announced that the meeting would start at nine.
checklist: Dùng said/told that đúng cấu trúc
Có ít nhất 3 câu trần thuật khác nhau
